title: VoidGuns
description: This plugin adds 10 functioning guns and more!
body:
# CORE Adds 10 new 3D Guns to the game, with their own passives and abilities, which are obtained through various crafting recipes involving custom alloys and plates. âš”ď¸Ź Combat Mechanics **Guns offer a completely different combat playstyle compared to bows. They are designed for speed, precision, and modern combat.** âś… Instant high-speed projectiles (No slow arrows!)
âś… Action bar UI showing your Chamber and Magazine ammo
âś… Custom Reloading (Short chambering vs Long magazine refill)
âś… Same durability mechanics as normal weapons
âś… Custom scoping with spyglass mechanics, + Slowness to feel like real scoping!
**Perfect for aggressive, ranged players who prefer fast gunplay over drawing a bow.** # Guns đź”« Glock (Pistol) ```Abilities: SHOOT (Left Click): Fires Basic Ammo instantly. (Cooldown: 0.5s) SCOPE (Right Click): Zooms in slightly to focus your aim. RELOAD (Shift + Right Click): Refills your magazine from your inventory. Passives: Ammo Capacity: 24 in Magazine | 8 in Chamber Durability: 1,000 uses ``` đź”« AR-15 (Assault Rifle) ```Abilities: AUTO-FIRE (Hold Left Click): Fires Basic Ammo continuously at high speeds. RELOAD (Shift + Right Click): Refills your magazine from your inventory. Passives: Ammo Capacity: 128 in Magazine | 30 in Chamber Durability: 5,000 uses ``` đź”« AK-47 ```Abilities: AUTO-FIRE (Hold Left Click): Fires Basic Ammo continuously, but slightly slower for higher damage. SCOPE (Right Click): Zooms in slightly to focus your aim. RELOAD (Shift + Right Click): Refills your magazine from your inventory. Passives: Ammo Capacity: 64 in Magazine | 20 in Chamber Durability: 2,000 uses ``` đź”« AWP (Sniper) ```Abilities: SHOOT (Left Click): Fires Heavy Ammo, dealing massive damage to the target. MEGA SCOPE (Right Click): Zooms in significantly for extreme long-range shots. RELOAD (Shift + Right Click): Refills your magazine from your inventory. Passives: Ammo Capacity: 8 in Magazine | 1 in Chamber Durability: 500 uses ``` đźš€ RPG (Bazooka) ```Abilities: SHOOT (Left Click): Fires a Missile that spawns a Large Fireball, exploding on impact and destroying blocks! SCOPE (Right Click): Zooms in slightly to focus your aim. RELOAD (Shift + Right Click): Refills your magazine from your inventory. Passives: Ammo Capacity: 4 in Magazine | 1 in Chamber Durability: 250 uses ``` đź”« M134 (Minigun) ```Abilities: FULL-AUTO (Hold Left Click): Shreds enemies with Small Ammo at extreme fire rates. RELOAD (Shift + Right Click): Refills your magazine from your inventory. Passives: Ammo Capacity: 500 in Magazine | 100 in Chamber Durability: 20,000 uses ``` đź”« M500 (Shotgun) ```Abilities: SPREAD SHOOT (Left Click): Fires Medium Ammo that spreads into 5 separate bullets per shot. SCOPE (Right Click): Zooms in slightly to focus your aim. RELOAD (Shift + Right Click): Refills your magazine from your inventory. Passives: Ammo Capacity: 24 in Magazine | 4 in Chamber Durability: 500 uses ``` đź”« Uzi ```Abilities: FULL-AUTO (Hold Left Click): Fires Small Ammo extremely fast for close-range combat. RELOAD (Shift + Right Click): Refills your magazine from your inventory. Passives: Ammo Capacity: 150 in Magazine | 40 in Chamber Durability: 5,000 uses ``` đź”« Hunting Rifle ```Abilities: SHOOT (Left Click): Fires Heavy Ammo with high precision. SCOPE (Right Click): Zooms in, but with slightly less zoom than the Sniper. RELOAD (Shift + Right Click): Refills your magazine from your inventory. Passives: Ammo Capacity: 24 in Magazine | 4 in Chamber Durability: 1,000 uses ``` đź§¨ Masanda (Legendary Rifle) ``` AUTO-FIRE (Hold Left Click): Fires Basic Ammo continuously. SCOPE (Right Click): Zooms in slightly to focus your aim. RELOAD (Shift + Right Click): Refills your magazine from your inventory. Passives: Explosive Rounds: 10% chance for shots to cause a mini-explosion dealing splash damage! Ammo Capacity: 128 in Magazine | 50 in Chamber Durability: Unbreakable (100,000 uses) ``` # Crafting There are multiple crafting recipes that are introduced with this plugin, including Custom Alloys (Gold-Iron, Copper-Iron, Tri-Alloy), Metal Plates, 5 types of Ammunition, and the Guns themselves! Crafting recipes are all listed in Gallery, with their own unique descriptions. # Miscellaneous The UI on the action bar will hide automatically when you are not holding a gun. Also, the short reload (chambering a bullet) happens automatically when your chamber reaches 0, but you can also force it by pressing Shift + Right Click when your magazine is full but your chamber is not! # Important Note Because this guns addon is a Plugin, I had a lot of restrictions while making it. So things like shooting automatically are actually just no cooldown, so you have to shoot really fast , because of the limitations of a plugin I couldnt change it. Next I have things like the crafting recipes or the reaload button ( I tried making it R but it's not possible ) and stuff like that. But even with those roadblocks I tried my best to combine plugin and guns to make a very well made Guns Plugin! So keep in mind that! # Resource Pack The resource pack is included in the downloads. All that is required is to enable it in the resource pack menu. It uses CustomModelData so it will not replace normal bows, ingots, or items in your world!
